objective: Implement the Phase 2 governance tooling deployer under parent epic #288, with dry-run, apply, verify, rollback, consumer-record writes, safety refusals, and real in-repo e2e fixture tests.
scope_boundary: Implement package-level deployer behavior defined by issue #290.
Preserve the existing Local CI shim deployer as a compatibility surface.
Write `.hldpro/governance-tooling.json` as the downstream consumed-version record.
Refuse dirty target repos and unmanaged managed-path overwrites by default.
Verify behavior with subprocess-backed temporary git repo tests.
Keep parent epic #288 open for downstream pilot and final e2e proof.
out_of_scope: Replacing GitHub Actions or CI-required checks.
Changing Local CI Gate runner semantics beyond adding the deployer test gate.
Claiming downstream repo adoption proof from temp fixture tests.
research_summary: Issue #290 created the package manifest and runbook contract. Subagent review confirmed the existing `deploy_local_ci_gate.py` is a narrow managed-shim installer and recommended adding a package-level deployer that reads the manifest, writes the consumer record, supports dry-run/apply/verify/rollback, and proves behavior through real temporary git repo e2e tests while preserving the compatibility shim surface.

sprints.name: Planning And Scope
sprints.goal: Create issue-backed scope and review artifacts before implementation closeout.
tasks: Create issue #292 under parent epic #288.
Add PDCAR, structured plan, cross-review memo, same-family exception, and execution scope.
Declare active parallel sibling lanes without cleaning them.
Update status mirrors.

sprints.name: Deployer Implementation
sprints.goal: Add package-level deployer behavior without breaking existing shim deployer compatibility.
tasks: Add `scripts/overlord/deploy_governance_tooling.py`.
Read `docs/governance-tooling-package.json` for package version and consumer record path.
Implement `dry-run`, `apply`, `verify`, and `rollback` commands.
Delegate Local CI shim rendering to `deploy_local_ci_gate.py`.
Write `.hldpro/governance-tooling.json` on apply.
Refuse unmanaged shim and consumer-record overwrites by default.
Refuse dirty target repos by default.
acceptance_criteria: Dry-run prints planned write set and rollback set without writing files.
Apply writes the managed shim and consumer record.
Verify fails before apply and passes after apply.
Existing Local CI shim deployer tests still pass.

sprints.name: Real In-Repo E2E Tests
sprints.goal: Prove deployer behavior against temporary git repo fixtures inside repo tests.
tasks: Add `scripts/overlord/test_deploy_governance_tooling.py`.
Create temporary git repos in tests.
Run dry-run, apply, verify, and rollback against the fixture.
Test idempotency, unmanaged overwrite refusal, unmanaged record refusal, dirty target refusal, and missing-record verify failure.
Wire the test into the Local CI Gate profile.
acceptance_criteria: Real fixture e2e test runs dry-run -> apply -> verify -> rollback.
Dirty target refusal includes staged, unstaged, or untracked changes through git porcelain status.
Unmanaged files are not overwritten by default.
Local CI Gate runs the deployer tests when deployer or contract files change.

sprints.name: Validation And Closeout
sprints.goal: Prove locally and in GitHub that the deployer works before closing issue #292.
tasks: Run deployer tests and compatibility shim tests.
Run execution-scope preflight, structured-plan validation, backlog alignment, and Local CI Gate.
Run closeout hook.
Open PR, watch checks, and close #292 after merge.
acceptance_criteria: Local deployer and compatibility tests pass.
Local CI Gate passes and includes `governance-tooling-deployer-tests`.

specialist_reviews.focus: Minimal Phase 2 implementation design and edge cases for package-level governance tooling deployer.
specialist_reviews.summary: Recommended a package-level deployer that reads the manifest, writes `.hldpro/governance-tooling.json`, supports dry-run/apply/verify/rollback, refuses unmanaged overwrites and dirty targets, and proves behavior with temporary git repo e2e tests.

alternate_model_review.summary: True alternate-family review was unavailable in this Codex lane. Same-family exception is scoped to the Phase 2 deployer implementation and mitigated by subagent design review, real e2e fixture tests, deterministic validation, Local CI Gate, and GitHub Actions.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #292 may add the package-level deployer, deployer tests, contract/runbook updates, Local CI Gate profile wiring, planning/review/scope artifacts, status mirrors, and closeout evidence. It may not edit downstream repos or close parent epic #288.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Validate, PR, watch checks, close issue #292, and leave parent epic #288 open for downstream pilot and final e2e proof.

material_deviation_rules: If downstream repo edits are needed, stop and create a downstream issue and execution scope first.
If the deployer overwrites unmanaged files by default, stop and revise.
If the deployer allows dirty target writes by default, stop and revise.
If real fixture e2e tests are removed or skipped, do not close #292.
If final downstream e2e proof is implied complete, stop and revise because #288 must remain open.
approved_by: operator instruction: create GH epic, PDCAR, loop e2e, no HITL, include real test runs as AC
